title: Myencin
description: This mod adds a magnet that can be used in interesting crafts
body:
With this mod you will have 4 directions of development in the world of minecraft!

Magnetic ore directions that will allow you to create new hammers, staffs, swords, projectiles, ingots, coins, workbenches, trade, blocks, structures.

Philosophy direction which adds special pouches, swords, philosopher's stone, flowers that have their own unique features.

Cynon Ore direction which adds staffs, swords, ore.

And a special creative direction where you can create new axes, crafts, workbenches and statues.

All directions are developing and changing
